summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The cluster is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, fix PRs, or low-signal closures are planned. Open hydrated PRs are kept independently for maintainer review or their existing proof/author-followup paths; the already closed PR is kept closed; unhydrated listed PRs receive non-mutating independent classifications because the compacted artifact did not provide live target_updated_at values.
